blended.narrative: Crabbe Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 7" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 3.7" of snow, highs of 45°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
